title: Guided workflow depth
summary: Forge Method now ships a broad guided-workflow depth batch: richer human routing, compact agent contracts, parity replay coverage, closure utilities, game and quality depth, builder factory workflows, persona lenses, and validated install behavior.
highlights: Guidance Engine and Help Oracle now route more human intent through explicit workflow decisions instead of stale state.
Builder Factory, Project Configuration, Capability Index, Persona Lens, Lifecycle Closure, Game Studio Depth, and Test Architecture Depth are packaged as a coherent runtime increment.
Guided closure utilities add investigation, working-backwards challenge, sprint status, checkpoint preview, and adversarial review workflows.
Parity replay now covers 58 route fixtures and runs during install smoke so packaged behavior matches source behavior.
Human-facing guidance is richer while workflow references, JSON state, templates, evidence, and handoffs stay compact for future agents.
Release evidence covers unit tests, workflow validation, runtime smoke, fast verification, install smoke, artifact verification, audit, and config validation.
